homepage.heroSubline: Transforming houses into dream homes across Northeast Florida. Quality craftsmanship and reliable service, guaranteed.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Jacksonville Homes, One Project at a Time
aboutText: Dreams Renovation Remodeling started with a simple goal: to provide Jacksonville homeowners with honest, reliable remodeling services. We saw a need for contractors who understood the unique challenges of Florida homes – the humidity, the salt air, and the occasional hurricane – and who could deliver quality work that lasts.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, develop a plan that fits your budget, and execute the project with precision and care. We believe in clear communication, transparency, and a commitment to exceeding your expectations. We treat every home as if it were our own.

We're proud to be a part of the Jacksonville community. We source materials locally whenever possible, and we actively support local charities and organizations. We believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Jacksonville homes and the challenges they face.

valueProps.title: Quality Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: We use only the best materials and skilled tradespeople.

valueProps.title: Transparent Communication
valueProps.description: We keep you informed every step of the way.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work and ensure you're happy with the results.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free consultation and discover the possibilities for your Jacksonville home.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your Jacksonville home.
services.description:
The kitchen is the center of any Jacksonville home. Dreams Renovation Remodeling specializes in creating functional, beautiful kitchens that meet your specific needs and style. Whether you're dreaming of a complete overhaul or a simple refresh, we've got you covered. We handle everything from design and layout to cabinet installation, countertop replacement, and appliance upgrades. 

We understand the importance of maximizing space and creating a kitchen that flows seamlessly. We factor in the hot, humid Jacksonville climate when selecting materials, ensuring durability and longevity. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of kitchen styles, from modern and minimalist to traditional and coastal. We can help you choose the perfect materials, finishes, and appliances to create a kitchen that reflects your personality and enhances your lifestyle. 

Our kitchen remodeling process includes a detailed consultation, 3D design renderings, transparent pricing, and expert installation. We'll work closely with you to ensure that every detail is perfect, from the placement of the lighting fixtures to the selection of the backsplash tile. With Dreams Renovation Remodeling, your dream kitchen is within reach.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – Discuss your vision and create a detailed plan.
Step 2: Material Selection – Choose the perfect cabinets, countertops, and appliances.
Step 3: Demolition and Preparation – Remove existing features and prepare the space.
Step 4: Installation and Finishing – Install new features and complete the finishing touches.

faq.question: How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 4-8 weeks.

faq.question: Do you handle the plumbing and electrical work?
faq.answer: Yes, we have licensed plumbers and electricians on our team to handle all necessary plumbing and electrical work.

faq.question: Can you help me with the design and layout of my new kitchen?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We offer design services to help you create a kitchen that meets your needs and style.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create a spa-like retreat in your Jacksonville home with our bathroom remodeling services.
services.description:
Dreams Renovation Remodeling transforms outdated bathrooms into luxurious and functional spaces. We specialize in bathroom remodels that address the unique needs of Jacksonville homeowners, from combating humidity and mold to maximizing space and creating a relaxing atmosphere. Whether you're looking for a complete renovation or a simple upgrade, we'll work with you to create a bathroom that reflects your personal style and enhances your daily routine. 

Our bathroom remodeling services include everything from tile installation and vanity replacement to shower and tub upgrades. We use high-quality, moisture-resistant materials to ensure that your new bathroom stands up to the challenges of the Florida climate. We also offer a wide range of design options, from modern and sleek to traditional and elegant. 

We understand that bathroom remodels can be disruptive, which is why we strive to minimize the inconvenience and complete the project as quickly and efficiently as possible. Our team is committed to providing excellent customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Let Dreams Renovation Remodeling create the bathroom of your dreams.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Planning – Discuss your vision and develop a detailed plan.
Step 2: Demolition and Removal – Safely remove existing fixtures and materials.
Step 3: Plumbing and Electrical – Update plumbing and electrical systems as needed.
Step 4: Installation and Finishing – Install new fixtures, tile, and finishes.

faq.question: What type of flooring is best for a bathroom in Jacksonville?
faq.answer: Tile is the most popular choice for bathroom flooring in Jacksonville due to its water resistance and durability. We can help you choose the perfect tile for your style and budget.

faq.question: Do you offer walk-in shower installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in walk-in shower installations, which are a great option for accessibility and style.

faq.question: How can I prevent mold and mildew in my bathroom?
faq.answer: Proper ventilation is key to preventing mold and mildew. We can install a high-quality exhaust fan and recommend mold-resistant materials.

services.name: Whole Home Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your entire Jacksonville home with our comprehensive remodeling services.
services.description:
Dreams Renovation Remodeling offers complete home remodeling services for Jacksonville homeowners looking to transform their living spaces. Whether you're renovating a historic home in Riverside or updating a suburban ranch in Mandarin, we have the expertise and experience to handle any project, big or small. We understand the unique challenges of remodeling older homes in Jacksonville, from dealing with outdated wiring and plumbing to preserving the original character and charm. 

Our whole home remodeling services include everything from kitchen and bathroom renovations to flooring, painting, and structural modifications. We work closely with you to develop a comprehensive plan that meets your needs and budget. We handle all aspects of the project, from design and permitting to construction and finishing. 

We're committed to providing excellent customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Our team is dedicated to delivering high-quality workmanship and completing the project on time and within budget. Let Dreams Renovation Remodeling transform your house into the home of your dreams.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation – Discuss your goals and vision for the project.
Step 2: Design and Planning – Develop a detailed plan and budget.
Step 3: Permitting and Approvals – Obtain all necessary permits and approvals.
Step 4: Construction and Completion – Execute the project with precision and care.

faq.question: How long does a whole home remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most whole home remodels take between 3-6 months.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: It depends on the scope of the project. We can discuss your options and help you decide whether it's necessary to move out.

faq.question: How much does a whole home remodel cost?
faq.answer: The cost varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate after the initial consultation.

services.name: Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your Jacksonville home with new flooring installed by experienced professionals.
services.description:
Dreams Renovation Remodeling offers professional flooring installation services for Jacksonville homeowners. We install a wide variety of flooring types, including hardwood, tile, laminate, vinyl, and carpet. We understand the importance of choosing the right flooring for your lifestyle and budget, and we're here to help you make the best decision for your home. 

We consider the Jacksonville climate when recommending flooring options, taking into account factors such as humidity and moisture. We use high-quality materials and proven installation techniques to ensure that your new flooring looks great and lasts for years to come. 

Our flooring installation process includes removing existing flooring, preparing the subfloor, installing the new flooring, and finishing the edges. We pay attention to every detail to ensure a flawless installation. We're committed to providing excellent customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Let Dreams Renovation Remodeling transform your home with beautiful new flooring.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Selection – Choose the perfect flooring for your needs and style.
Step 2: Demolition and Preparation – Remove existing flooring and prepare the subfloor.
Step 3: Installation – Install the new flooring with precision and care.
Step 4: Finishing – Complete the finishing touches and clean up the job site.

faq.question: What type of flooring is best for a home with pets?
faq.answer: Tile, laminate, and vinyl are all good options for homes with pets due to their durability and stain resistance.

faq.question: How long does it take to install new flooring?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size of the room and the type of flooring, but most flooring installations take between 1-3 days.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for flooring installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer financing options to help you make your dream flooring a reality.

services.name: Painting Services
services.shortDescription: Refresh your Jacksonville home with our professional interior and exterior painting services.
services.description:
Dreams Renovation Remodeling provides professional painting services for Jacksonville homeowners. Whether you're looking to refresh the interior of your home or protect the exterior from the elements, we have the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We use high-quality paints and proven techniques to ensure a beautiful and long-lasting finish. 

We understand the importance of proper preparation, which is why we take the time to thoroughly clean and prepare all surfaces before painting. We also offer color consultation services to help you choose the perfect colors for your home. 

Our painting services include interior painting, exterior painting, cabinet painting, and drywall repair. We're committed to providing excellent customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Let Dreams Renovation Remodeling transform your home with a fresh coat of paint.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Color Selection – Choose the perfect colors for your home.
Step 2: Preparation – Clean and prepare all surfaces for painting.
Step 3: Painting – Apply high-quality paint with precision and care.
Step 4: Clean Up – Clean up the job site and leave it spotless.

faq.question: How often should I repaint my home's exterior?
faq.answer: It depends on the climate and the type of paint, but most homes should be repainted every 5-10 years.

faq.question: What type of paint is best for a bathroom?
faq.answer: A moisture-resistant paint with a satin or semi-gloss finish is best for bathrooms.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your painting services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our painting services to ensure your complete satisfaction.

services.name: Deck and Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or patio built by Dreams Renovation Remodeling.
services.description:
Dreams Renovation Remodeling specializes in designing and building custom decks and patios for Jacksonville homeowners. We can help you create the perfect outdoor living space for relaxing, entertaining, and enjoying the beautiful Florida weather. We use high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship to ensure that your new deck or patio is both beautiful and durable. 

We consider the Jacksonville climate when designing and building decks and patios, taking into account factors such as humidity, sun exposure, and insect resistance. We offer a wide range of design options, from simple and functional to elaborate and luxurious. 

Our deck and patio construction services include design, permitting, construction, and finishing. We're committed to providing excellent customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Let Dreams Renovation Remodeling transform your backyard into an outdoor oasis.
process: Step 1: Design and Planning – Develop a custom design that meets your needs and style.
Step 2: Permitting – Obtain all necessary permits and approvals.
Step 3: Construction – Build the deck or patio with precision and care.
Step 4: Finishing – Complete the finishing touches and clean up the job site.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for a deck in Jacksonville?
faq.answer: Pressure-treated lumber, cedar, and redwood are all good options for decks in Jacksonville due to their resistance to insects and decay.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: Yes, most cities in Jacksonville require a permit to build a deck or patio.

faq.question: How much does it cost to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: The cost varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate after the initial consultation.

serviceAreas.content:
Dreams Renovation Remodeling is proud to offer our remodeling services to the historic city of St. Augustine, Florida. We understand the unique architectural character of this city, with its beautiful Spanish Colonial influences. Our experienced team is skilled in preserving the integrity of older homes while bringing them up to modern standards of comfort and efficiency. Whether you're looking to update your kitchen, renovate a bathroom, or add an addition to your home, we can help. 

We are familiar with the challenges posed by St. Augustine's hot and humid climate. We use high-quality, weather-resistant materials to ensure that your renovation stands the test of time. We also offer energy-efficient solutions to help you reduce your energy bills and keep your home comfortable year-round. From Anastasia Island to the historic downtown area, we are committed to providing exceptional remodeling services to the residents of St. Augustine.
serviceAreas.localContext: St. Augustine, Florida, is a city steeped in history and known for its distinct Spanish Colonial architecture, attracting tourists year-round.

serviceAreas.content:
Dreams Renovation Remodeling is delighted to provide top-notch remodeling services to the residents of Orange Park, Florida. Known for its many 1970s and 80s suburban ranch-style homes, Orange Park offers a unique canvas for remodeling projects. We understand the specific needs and desires of homeowners in this area, from updating kitchens and bathrooms to creating more open and functional living spaces.

Our team is experienced in working with the common architectural styles found in Orange Park, and we can help you transform your home into a modern and stylish space that reflects your personal taste. We also understand the importance of energy efficiency in Florida's hot and humid climate, and we offer a variety of energy-saving solutions to help you reduce your energy costs and improve your home's comfort. Dreams Renovation Remodeling is committed to providing exceptional service and quality workmanship to the Orange Park community.
serviceAreas.localContext: Orange Park, Florida, features many suburban ranch-style homes built in the 1970s and 80s, offering opportunities for modern renovation.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Dreams Renovation Remodeling did an amazing job on our kitchen! They completely transformed the space and made it so much more functional. The team was professional, courteous, and always on time. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: We hired Dreams Renovation Remodeling to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very happy with the results. The team was knowledgeable and helpful throughout the entire process. There were a couple of minor hiccups, but they were quick to address them.

reviews.name: Lisa P.
reviews.text: Dreams Renovation Remodeling installed new hardwood flooring throughout our entire home. The installation was flawless, and the floors look beautiful. The team was very professional and efficient.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We hired Dreams Renovation Remodeling to paint the exterior of our home, and we're extremely pleased with the results. The paint job looks fantastic, and the team was very careful to protect our landscaping.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Dreams Renovation Remodeling built a beautiful new deck for our backyard. The deck is perfect for entertaining, and we've already spent countless hours enjoying it. The only reason I didn't give them 5 stars is that the project took slightly longer than expected.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Dreams Renovation Remodeling renovated our entire house, including the kitchen, bathrooms, and flooring. The transformation is incredible! The team was very professional and communicative throughout the entire process. We highly recommend them!
